---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Jobilo
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction Steps

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots, console logs, or stack traces.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 125, Firefox 128, Safari 17)
- **Node Version:** (e.g. 18.20, 20.15)
- **Docker Version:** (if applicable)
- **Database:** (e.g. PostgreSQL 16)

## Priority

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — blocks release or production
- [ ] 🟠 High — major feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — feature broken, workaround exists
- [ ] 🟢 Low — cosmetic or non-blocking

## Severity

- [ ] ⛔ Crash / data loss
- [ ] ❌ Major functionality broken
- [ ] ⚠️ Minor functionality broken
- [ ] 💬 Visual / typo / UX nit

## Additional Context

Add any other context, related issues, or possible root cause here.
